creator: amagai@nue.org
text:
A ports japanese/mimekit, the mimekit1.9 produces blank line in header part of
mail.  It causes fatal processing errors to mail reader etc.  The old version
(mimekit 1.7) works fine with same input.

How-To-Repeat:  Sample data included in this PR in uuencoded format.

uudecoe < thisPR
and make mimekit in ports collection, then 
deMime < sample.data

begin 644 sample.data
